acceptance_criteria: docs/compat.md Misskey and Sharkey rows show applicable checkmarks; Emoji objects with short-code ids don't cause parse failures; Misskey posts appear in federated timeline; follow/follow-back works
description: Test and fix compatibility with Misskey/Sharkey. Known quirks: Emoji objects with non-URI id fields, different visibility model, MFM formatting in content. Test the applicable compat matrix rows.
design: Known Misskey quirk from spec: Emoji objects have id fields that are short codes not URIs. Tolerate on inbound. MFM (Misskey Flavored Markdown): accept HTML in content_html, don't attempt to parse MFM. Test against misskey.io.
title: Misskey / Sharkey compatibility testing and bug fixes
